film.title: Veergati
film.overview: A gangster and his flunkies abduct and kill a man's daughter. Soon, the man's adopted son sets out to avenge her death.

dialogues.dialogue: I staked everything had to make your life. And now you ruined everything. I've not come across as shameless a person as you are. You're sitting here in spite of being bashed up severely? Get out from here.
dialogues.cause_raw: ruining own life and being shameless

dialogues.dialogue: A pimp has to be paid a commission. And you've to be paid a bribe. So you'll prevent me from taking her away? She's the pride of our community. Do not insult her. I'm incl-large of Karrlatl-lipura Police Station. How did you arrest her without seeking my permission?

I've suffered a lot by losing you. You see, Ajay']l ensure that you're married off. I mistook my false ego to be my pride. This is my punishment. - No, it'll be your atonement, father. Repeat it again. What did you say?
